Example

Class PlanSetup

Namespace
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.API
Assembly
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.API.dll

Represents a treatment plan. See the definition of a DICOM RT Plan for more information.

public class PlanSetup : PlanningItem, IXmlSerializable
Inheritance
object
SerializableObject
ApiDataObject
PlanningItem
PlanSetup
Implements
IXmlSerializable
Derived
BrachyPlanSetup
ExternalPlanSetup
IonPlanSetup

Flag that indicates whether there are errors upon calculation completion.

Properties

ApplicationScriptLogs

The log entries of the script executions that have modified the plan.

public IEnumerable<ApplicationScriptLog> ApplicationScriptLogs { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<ApplicationScriptLog>

ApprovalHistory

Returns the approval history of the plan setup.

public IEnumerable<ApprovalHistoryEntry> ApprovalHistory { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<ApprovalHistoryEntry>

ApprovalHistoryLocalized

Returns the localized approval history of the plan setup.

public IEnumerable<ApprovalHistoryEntry> ApprovalHistoryLocalized { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<ApprovalHistoryEntry>

ApprovalStatus

The approval status.

public PlanSetupApprovalStatus ApprovalStatus { get; }

Property Value

PlanSetupApprovalStatus

ApprovalStatusAsString

Returns the approval status as a string (localized).

public string ApprovalStatusAsString { get; }

Property Value

string

BaseDosePlanningItem

BaseDose for the optimization, can be either plan or plan sum.

public PlanningItem BaseDosePlanningItem { get; set; }

Property Value

PlanningItem

Beams

A collection of all the beams in the plan (including setup beams). Returns an empty collection if not applicable for the plan, for example, if the plan is a brachytherapy plan.

public IEnumerable<Beam> Beams { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<Beam>

BeamsInTreatmentOrder

A collection of all the beams in the plan (including setup beams) in treatment order. Returns an empty collection if not applicable for the plan, for example, if the plan is a brachytherapy plan.

public IEnumerable<Beam> BeamsInTreatmentOrder { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<Beam>

Comment

[Availability of this property depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] A comment about the Plan.

public string Comment { get; set; }

Property Value

string

CreationUserName

The name of the user who saved the plan for the first time.

public string CreationUserName { get; }

Property Value

string

DBKey

DataBase key of the plan.

public string DBKey { get; }

Property Value

string

DVHEstimates

Returns a list of DVH estimate objects for this plan

public IEnumerable<EstimatedDVH> DVHEstimates { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<EstimatedDVH>

DosePerFraction

The dose per fraction.

public DoseValue DosePerFraction { get; }

Property Value

DoseValue

DosePerFractionInPrimaryRefPoint

The calculated fraction dose in the primary reference point.

[Obsolete("Use PlannedDosePerFraction instead")]
public DoseValue DosePerFractionInPrimaryRefPoint { get; }

Property Value

DoseValue

ElectronCalculationModel

The name of the electron calculation model. Not applicable to brachytherapy plans.

public string ElectronCalculationModel { get; }

Property Value

string

ElectronCalculationOptions

The electron calculation options. Not applicable to brachytherapy plans.

public Dictionary<string, string> ElectronCalculationOptions { get; }

Property Value

Dictionary<string, string>

Id

[Availability of this property depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] The identifier of the PlanSetup.

public string Id { get; set; }

Property Value

string

IntegrityHash

Returns the plan's integrity hash. Returns null if the plan's integrity hash has not been set.

public string IntegrityHash { get; }

Property Value

string

IsDoseValid

Returns the value true if the plan dose is valid. This implies that the dose object returned from the dose property is not null and can therefore be used to query dose values.

public bool IsDoseValid { get; }

Property Value

bool

IsTreated

Checks if the treatment plan has been delivered.

public bool IsTreated { get; }

Property Value

bool

Name

[Availability of this property depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] The name of the Plan.

public string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

NumberOfFractions

The number of fractions.

public int? NumberOfFractions { get; }

Property Value

int?

OptimizationSetup

Provides access to optimization objectives and parameters.

public OptimizationSetup OptimizationSetup { get; }

Property Value

OptimizationSetup

PatientSupportDevice

Patient support device.

public PatientSupportDevice PatientSupportDevice { get; }

Property Value

PatientSupportDevice

PhotonCalculationModel

The name of the photon calculation model. Not applicable to brachytherapy plans.

public string PhotonCalculationModel { get; }

Property Value

string

PhotonCalculationOptions

The photon calculation options. Not applicable to brachytherapy plans.

public Dictionary<string, string> PhotonCalculationOptions { get; }

Property Value

Dictionary<string, string>

PlanIntent

The plan intent as in DICOM, or an empty string. The defined terms are "CURATIVE", "PALLIATIVE", "PROPHYLACTIC", "VERIFICATION", "MACHINE_QA", "RESEARCH" and "SERVICE", but the value can be different for imported plans.

public string PlanIntent { get; }

Property Value

string

PlanIsInTreatment

Checks if plan is loaded into console.

public bool PlanIsInTreatment { get; }

Property Value

bool

PlanNormalizationMethod

The user interface name for the current normalization method.

public string PlanNormalizationMethod { get; }

Property Value

string

PlanNormalizationPoint

The plan normalization point.

public VVector PlanNormalizationPoint { get; }

Property Value

VVector

PlanNormalizationValue

[Availability of this property depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] The plan normalization value in percentage. The plan is normalized according to the plan normalization value, for instance, 200%. The value is Double.NaN if it is not defined. The property setter changes also the plan normalization method to Plan Normalization Value.

public double PlanNormalizationValue { get; set; }

Property Value

double

PlanObjectiveStructures

The list of structure IDs that are present in the plan objectives (prescriptions and indices).

public IEnumerable<string> PlanObjectiveStructures { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<string>

PlanType

The plan type.

public PlanType PlanType { get; }

Property Value

PlanType

PlanUncertainties

Plan uncertainties defined for the plan.

public IEnumerable<PlanUncertainty> PlanUncertainties { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<PlanUncertainty>

DoseValue

The date when the plan was approved for planning.

public string PlanningApprovalDate { get; }

string

PlanningApprover

The identifier of the user who approved the plan for planning.

string

The display name of the user who approved the plan for planning.

The prescribed fraction dose.

[Obsolete("Use DosePerFraction instead")]

Property Value

DoseValue

PrescribedPercentage

The prescribed dose percentage as a decimal number. For example, if the prescribed dose percentage shown in the Eclipse user interface is 80 %, returns 0.8

[Obsolete("Use TreatmentPercentage instead")]
public double PrescribedPercentage { get; }

Property Value

double

The primary reference point.

string

string

The name of the proton calculation model. Not applicable to brachytherapy plans.

string

The proton calculation options. Not applicable to brachytherapy plans.

Dictionary<string, string>

Used for navigating to the linked prescription.

RTPrescription

Collection of reference points in the plan.

IEnumerable<ReferencePoint>

Series

The series that contains this plan. Null if the plan is not connected to a series.

public Series Series { get; }

Series

SeriesUID

The DICOM UID of the series that contains this plan. Empty string if the plan is not connected to a series.

string

The target volume identifier.

string

The date when the plan was approved for treatment.

string

TreatmentApprover

The identifier of the user who approved the plan for treatment.

string

TreatmentOrientation

The orientation of the treatment.

public PatientOrientation TreatmentOrientation { get; }

Property Value

PatientOrientation

TreatmentOrientationAsString

The orientation of the treatment as a string (localized).

public string TreatmentOrientationAsString { get; }

Property Value

string

TreatmentPercentage

The treatment percentage as a decimal number. For example, if the treatment percentage shown in the Eclipse user interface is 80%, returns 0.8.

public double TreatmentPercentage { get; }

Property Value

double

TreatmentSessions

Treatment sessions for the plan, either scheduled sessions or treated sessions.

public IEnumerable<PlanTreatmentSession> TreatmentSessions { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<PlanTreatmentSession>

UID

The DICOM UID of the plan.

public string UID { get; }

Property Value

string

UseGating

Boolean to mark if gating is used in the plan.

public bool UseGating { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

VerifiedPlan

Returns the verified plan if this is a verification plan, otherwise returns null. The verified plan is the clinical plan that was used to create the verification plan.

public PlanSetup VerifiedPlan { get; }

Property Value

PlanSetup

Remarks

Always returns null if the plan has multiple fractionations.

Methods

AddPlanUncertaintyWithParameters(PlanUncertaintyType, bool, double, VVector)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Add a new plan or field uncertainty with parameters. In case of field specific uncertainty, HUConversionError is overwritten to be always zero. Supported uncertainty types: RangeUncertainty, IsocenterShiftUncertainty, BaselineShiftUncertainty, RobustOptimizationUncertainty (=Perturbation). RangeUncertainty and RobustOptimizationUncertainty are proton specific. IsocenterShiftUncertainty and BaselineShiftUncertainty are photon specific. Field specific plan uncertainty dose can be used only for RobustOptimizationUncertainty. In case of BaselineShiftUncertainty isocenterShift parameter is actually target shift.

public PlanUncertainty AddPlanUncertaintyWithParameters(PlanUncertaintyType uncertaintyType, bool planSpecificUncertainty, double HUConversionError, VVector isocenterShift)

Parameters

uncertaintyType PlanUncertaintyType

Type of the plan uncertainty dose.

planSpecificUncertainty bool

The plan uncertainty dose is either plan specific (true) or field specific (false).

HUConversionError double

Calibration curve error [%]

isocenterShift VVector

Patient setup error [cm]

Returns

PlanUncertainty

AddReferencePoint(bool, VVector?, string)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Creates a new reference point and links it to the plan.

public ReferencePoint AddReferencePoint(bool target, VVector? location, string id)

Parameters

target bool

Indicates whether the reference point tracks treatment target (true) or organ at risk (false).

location VVector?

Reference point location in mm.

id string

Reference point ID.

Returns

ReferencePoint

Newly created reference point.

AddReferencePoint(ReferencePoint)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Creates a new reference point and links it to the plan.

public void AddReferencePoint(ReferencePoint refPoint)

Parameters

refPoint ReferencePoint

AttachToCalcClient(ICalculationClient)

Attaches event handling.

protected void AttachToCalcClient(ICalculationClient doseCalcClient)

Parameters

doseCalcClient ICalculationClient

CalculateDVHEstimatesImpl(IPhotonCalculation, ICalculationClient, string, Dictionary<string, DoseValue>, Dictionary<string, string>, LicenseId)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Calculates DVH estimates for the plan.

protected CalculationResult CalculateDVHEstimatesImpl(IPhotonCalculation dvhCalculator, ICalculationClient client, string modelId, Dictionary<string, DoseValue> targetDoseLevels, Dictionary<string, string> structureMatches, LicenseId license)

Parameters

dvhCalculator IPhotonCalculation

Interface for calculating the DVH estimates.

client ICalculationClient

Calculation client.

modelId string

DVH estimation model ID.

targetDoseLevels Dictionary<string, DoseValue>

Dose levels for the target structures.

structureMatches Dictionary<string, string>

Matching between the IDs of the structures contained in the structure set used in the plan (the Key in the Dictionary) and the structures used in the DVH estimation model (the Value in the Dictionary).

license LicenseId

License required for running the DVH estimation

Returns

CalculationResult

The calculation result. See the calculation details in the calculation logs

ClearCalculationModel(CalculationType)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Clears the calculation model for the given calculation type.

public void ClearCalculationModel(CalculationType calculationType)

Parameters

calculationType CalculationType

The type of calculation.

DetachFromCalcClient(ICalculationClient)

Detaches event handling for the calculation client.

protected void DetachFromCalcClient(ICalculationClient doseCalcClient)

Parameters

doseCalcClient ICalculationClient

GetCalculationModel(CalculationType)

Returns the selected calculation model for the given calculation type. Returns null if no model has been selected.

public string GetCalculationModel(CalculationType calculationType)

Parameters

calculationType CalculationType

The type of calculation.

Returns

string

Returns the selected calculation model for the given calculation type. Returns null if no model has been selected.

GetCalculationOption(string, string, out string)

Gets the given calculation option value.

public bool GetCalculationOption(string calculationModel, string optionName, out string optionValue)

Parameters

calculationModel string

The name of the calculation model.

optionName string

The XPath or name of the option to set.

optionValue string

The value of the given option.

Returns

bool

Returns false if the method cannot find the given option.

Remarks

Available options are stored in the schema files of the calculation model located on the Distributed Calculation Framework (DCF) server.

GetCalculationOptions(string)

Gets all the calculation options and their values for the given calculation model.

public Dictionary<string, string> GetCalculationOptions(string calculationModel)

Parameters

calculationModel string

The name of the calculation model.

Returns

Dictionary<string, string>

A list of key-value pairs where the key is the XPath of the option and the value is the option value.

GetDvhEstimationModelName()

Retrieves the name of DVH Estimation Model.

public string GetDvhEstimationModelName()

Returns

string

GetProtocolPrescriptionsAndMeasures(ref List<ProtocolPhasePrescription>, ref List<ProtocolPhaseMeasure>)

Gets the prescriptions and measures in the protocol that is associated with this plan setup.

public void GetProtocolPrescriptionsAndMeasures(ref List<ProtocolPhasePrescription> prescriptions, ref List<ProtocolPhaseMeasure> measures)

Parameters

prescriptions List<ProtocolPhasePrescription>

Returned list of prescriptions (plan objectives).

measures List<ProtocolPhaseMeasure>

Returned list of plan measures (quality indices).

IsEntireBodyAndBolusesCoveredByCalculationArea()

Checks the limits of the current calculation area.

public bool IsEntireBodyAndBolusesCoveredByCalculationArea()

Returns

bool

True if calculation area covers entire body or, if no body defined, image.

IsValidForPlanApproval(out List<PlanValidationResultEsapiDetail>)

Check if plan approval status is valid. Note: Configured approval extensions are not executed.

public bool IsValidForPlanApproval(out List<PlanValidationResultEsapiDetail> validationResults)

Parameters

validationResults List<PlanValidationResultEsapiDetail>

Validation results which contain detailed warning and error messages.

Returns

bool

Returns true if no errors are found.

Remarks

This function will return true even if there were warnings found during validation.

MoveToCourse(Course)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Moves the plan setup from its current course to the destination course, maintaining the plan UID.

public void MoveToCourse(Course destinationCourse)

Parameters

destinationCourse Course

The destination course for the plan setup.

RemoveReferencePoint(ReferencePoint)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Remove provided reference point from plan

public void RemoveReferencePoint(ReferencePoint refPoint)

Parameters

refPoint ReferencePoint

Reference point to remove.

Report(string)

Reporting.

protected void Report(string str)

Parameters

str string

SetCalculationModel(CalculationType, string)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Sets the calculation model for the given calculation type.

public void SetCalculationModel(CalculationType calculationType, string model)

Parameters

calculationType CalculationType

The type of calculation.

model string

The name of the calculation model.

SetCalculationOption(string, string, string)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Sets the given calculation option to the given value. Before setting the options for the model, set the calculation model. See SetCalculationModel.

public bool SetCalculationOption(string calculationModel, string optionName, string optionValue)

Parameters

calculationModel string

The name of the calculation model.

optionName string

The XPath or name of the option to set. If this is not an XPath, the method sets the first attribute that matches the name. Example 1: CalculationGridSizeInCM in the Anisotropic Analytical Algorithm (AAA) sets the option /AAACalculationOptions/@CalculationGridSizeInCM. Example 2: MaximalDrillDepthInCM in the Proton Convolution Superposition (PCS) algorithm sets the option /ProtonCalculationOptions/ScatteringUniformScanning/CompensatorConversion/Drilling1/@MaximalDrillDepthInCM. To set the values, for example, for the Drilling2 settings, you have to specify the entire XPath /ProtonCalculationOptions/ScatteringUniformScanning/CompensatorConversion/Drilling2/@MaximalDrillDepthInCM.

optionValue string

The value to set.

Returns

bool

Returns false if the method cannot find the given option.

Remarks

Available options are stored in the schema files of the calculation model located on the Distributed Calculation Framework (DCF) server.

SetPrescription(int, DoseValue, double)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Sets and validates the number of fractions and dose per fraction.

public void SetPrescription(int numberOfFractions, DoseValue dosePerFraction, double treatmentPercentage)

Parameters

numberOfFractions int

The number of fractions.

dosePerFraction DoseValue

The dose per fraction.

treatmentPercentage double

The treatment percentage as a decimal number. For example, if the treatment percentage shown in the user interface is 80%, use 0.8.

SetTargetStructureIfNoDose(Structure, StringBuilder)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Sets or changes target structure if valid dose is not affected by the change.

public bool SetTargetStructureIfNoDose(Structure newTargetStructure, StringBuilder errorHint)

Parameters

newTargetStructure Structure

New target structure.

errorHint StringBuilder

Holder for error message.

Returns

bool

Boolean value indicating success (true) or failure (false).

SetTreatmentOrder(IEnumerable<Beam>)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Sets the treatment order of the beams.

public void SetTreatmentOrder(IEnumerable<Beam> orderedBeams)

Parameters

orderedBeams IEnumerable<Beam>

The beams in wanted order. All the beams of the plan must be present, otherwise the method fails.

WriteXml(XmlWriter)

Converts an object into its XML representation. For more information on how to serialize an object into an XML document, see System.Xml.Serialization.XmlSerializer.

public override void WriteXml(XmlWriter writer)

Parameters

writer XmlWriter

The System.Xml.XmlWriter stream, to which the object is serialized.
